reviewer: Claude coding agent, during the sankey gap-closure pass
scope: All 64 family-by-variant cells reviewed as a full-sheet render; the four Sankey cells re-inspected at native size after the composited-ribbon-contrast fix and the balanced canonical example. In every variant (sentinel, warm editorial, light technical, dark operations) the ribbons read clearly against the cell background — including the dark-operations cell, where the contrast-compensated strokes keep the ribbons off the near-black ground instead of vanishing — and conservation reads truthfully (Coal 127.93 into Electricity grid; out to Industry 71.24 + Losses 56.69 = 127.93). Labels are legible and side-flipped per variant palette. The 60 pre-existing cells are unchanged in composition — Class endpoints, XY labels, GitGraph labels, Mindmap connectors, and authored Pie emphasis remain intact.
